texto: As long as you don't tell your father that I seduced you, tied you to my bed and made love to you, then treated you like my personal sex slave, I'll probably make it through the meeting alive. Explaining dominant behavior isn't exactly easy. I'll be lucky if he doesn't kill me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lauren Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “As long as you don't tell your father that I seduced you, tied you to my bed and made love to you…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, father, lauren-smith pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de lauren-smith e the-gilded-cuff.
